name: sample-advanced-status-report
description: Advanced template example showcasing defaults, parameters metadata, and rich parameter descriptions.
prompt: Generate a {{report_type}} status report for {{project}} as of {{date}}. Owner: {{owner}}. Status: {{status}}. Summary: {{summary}}

project.description: Name of the project or service

status.description: Current status: on-track, at-risk, or blocked

summary.description: Brief summary of progress and blockers

report_type.description: Report frequency: daily, weekly, or monthly

date.description: Report date in YYYY-MM-DD format or 'today'
